metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1065
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Data in Figure 7 shows live cell labelling with CDH-8 antibodies co-localizes with pre (vGlut) and post synaptic (SynGAP) antigens in cortical neurons in culture. Figure 7C to F indicate CDH-8 immunogold labelling at asymmetrical glutamatergic synapses. The antibodies are subjected to some basic characterization but s the authors point out they lack the quantification to define is the labelling is predominantly pre or post synaptic.

21/8/2017 Pim
- membrane association inferred from TM domain.. Experimental description: Materials and methods:Figure 7 A and B contains cortical culture staining "Cortical neurons were cultured from E 18.5 Sprague- Dawley Rats. In addition immunogold EM in Figure 7C-F is performed on sections of dorsal striatum "sections through P30 mouse striatum were prepared for electron microscopy".

21/8/2017 Pim
- Species selection based on EM pictures --> mouse
